purpose: Minimal external toy crystal set for testing composition pressure against the current project crystal set.

crystals.notes: This toy methodology crystal assumes a simplified direct-activation style with weaker separation between framing and routing than the current project set.
This toy routing crystal assumes direct flattening of most runtime context into a smaller two-layer route, creating a plausible but weaker fit with the current project's routing discipline.

features: role overlap with current methodology and routing crystals
phase compatibility at a coarse level
framing and routing assumptions weaker than the current project set
not an obviously composable or obviously rejectable case
